summary: Completed comprehensive testing of calendar-based UI view for all roles (admin/teacher/student) with monthly/weekly toggle and Regenerate Zoom Link functionality. All major features working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Some classes missing 'platform' field in response

passed_tests: Calendar monthly view displays classes on correct dates
Calendar weekly view shows classes in time slots (7am-8pm)
Calendar navigation (prev/next month/week, Today button) works
Click class event opens detail panel with full class info
Detail panel shows student, teacher, platform, status, duration
Regenerate Zoom Link button visible for admin only
Teacher dashboard has Calendar tab showing their classes
Student dashboard has Calendar tab showing their classes
Regenerate Zoom Link button correctly hidden for non-admin users
Calendar data endpoints working for all roles
